scripts.build:wasm: node scripts/bundle.mjs && npx --yes @bytecodealliance/jco componentize dist/index.bundle.js --disable all --enable clocks --enable random --enable stdio --wit ../wasm/lnbits-extension.wit --world-name streetfighterwasm -o ../wasm/module.wasm
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check ../static/lnbits-extension-sdk.js && node --check ../static/admin.js && node test/minimum.test.js && node test/authorization.test.js && node test/haircut.test.js
